results.prompt: What is the capital of France? Answer in one word.
Create a file notes.txt in the workspace containing the single line: todo: buy milk
results.why: A one-file write — simple side effect, PI does it itself.

results.prompt: Write a small JavaScript function reverseString(s) that reverses a string, and save it to utils.js.
results.why: A tiny single-file script — well within PI; no specialized harness needed.

results.prompt: Build a complete React todo app with Vite and Tailwind: multiple components, add/delete/mark-complete, localStorage persistence, clean styling. Scaffold and implement the whole project.
results.why: Large multi-file app build — a dedicated coding agent fits better than PI inline.

results.prompt: Scaffold a Next.js app, start the dev server, and keep iterating on the landing page with live preview — adjust layout and styles until it looks polished. Keep the server running.
results.why: Long stateful dev with a running server — agent-in-sandbox.

results.prompt: A user uploaded an untrusted Python script. Run it safely in an isolated sandbox and report its output.
results.why: Untrusted code — needs sandbox isolation PI cannot give on its own.
